testcase.name: test_file_deleted_in_container_removed_from_db

skipped.message: File was not indexed, cannot test deletion

testcase.skipped: /sda/sokatov/own/perslad/e2e-tests/tests/test_agents_ingestor_integration.py:251: File was not indexed, cannot test deletion

testcase.name: test_ingestor_health_endpoint

failure.message: httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected without sending a response.

testcase.failure:
/home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:101: in map_httpcore_exceptions yield /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:394: in handle_async_request resp = await self._pool.handle_async_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:256: in handle_async_request raise exc from None /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:236: in handle_async_request response = await connection.handle_async_request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection.py:103: in handle_async_request return await self._connection.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:136: in handle_async_request raise exc /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:106: in handle_async_request ) = await self._receive_response_headers(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:177: in _receive_response_headers event = await self._receive_event(timeout=timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:231: in _receive_event raise RemoteProtocolError(msg) E httpcore.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected without sending a response.
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_component_ingestor.py:79: in test_ingestor_health_endpoint response = await ingestor_client.get(Ingestor.HEALTH) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1768: in get return await self.request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1540: in request return await self.send(request, auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1629: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1657: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1694: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1730: in _send_single_request response = await transport.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:393: in handle_async_request with map_httpcore_exceptions(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:118: in map_httpcore_exceptions raise mapped_exc(message) from exc E httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected without sending a response.

testcase.name: test_ingestor_stats_endpoint

failure.message: httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected without sending a response.

testcase.failure:

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_component_ingestor.py:88: in test_ingestor_stats_endpoint response = await ingestor_client.get(Ingestor.STATS) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1768: in get return await self.request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1540: in request return await self.send(request, auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1629: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1657: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1694: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1730: in _send_single_request response = await transport.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:393: in handle_async_request with map_httpcore_exceptions(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:118: in map_httpcore_exceptions raise mapped_exc(message) from exc E httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected without sending a response.

testcase.name: test_search_finds_sample_files
testcase.failure:
/home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:101: in map_httpcore_exceptions yield /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:394: in handle_async_request resp = await self._pool.handle_async_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:256: in handle_async_request raise exc from None /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:236: in handle_async_request response = await connection.handle_async_request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection.py:103: in handle_async_request return await self._connection.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:136: in handle_async_request raise exc /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:106: in handle_async_request ) = await self._receive_response_headers(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:177: in _receive_response_headers event = await self._receive_event(timeout=timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:217: in _receive_event data = await self._network_stream.read( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_backends/anyio.py:32: in read with map_exceptions(exc_map): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_exceptions.py:14: in map_exceptions raise to_exc(exc) from exc E httpcore.ReadError

testcase.name: test_search_with_top_k_parameter
testcase.failure:
/home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:101: in map_httpcore_exceptions yield /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:394: in handle_async_request resp = await self._pool.handle_async_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:256: in handle_async_request raise exc from None /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:236: in handle_async_request response = await connection.handle_async_request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection.py:103: in handle_async_request return await self._connection.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:136: in handle_async_request raise exc /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:106: in handle_async_request ) = await self._receive_response_headers(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:177: in _receive_response_headers event = await self._receive_event(timeout=timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:217: in _receive_event data = await self._network_stream.read( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_backends/anyio.py:32: in read with map_exceptions(exc_map): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_exceptions.py:14: in map_exceptions raise to_exc(exc) from exc E httpcore.ReadError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_component_ingestor.py:296: in test_search_with_top_k_parameter response = await ingestor_client.post(Ingestor.SEARCH, json=search_payload) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1859: in post return await self.request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1540: in request return await self.send(request, auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1629: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1657: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1694: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1730: in _send_single_request response = await transport.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:393: in handle_async_request with map_httpcore_exceptions(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:118: in map_httpcore_exceptions raise mapped_exc(message) from exc E httpx.ReadError

testcase.name: test_expected_valid_files_in_db

error.message: failed on setup with "Failed: Expected files not indexed within 30s: ['test_sample.py', 'test_sample.md', 'test_sample.txt', 'test_empty.txt', 'test_binary.bin']"

testcase.error: /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:302: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper result = event_loop.run_until_complete(setup()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/asyncio/base_events.py:691: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:284: in setup res = await gen_obj.__anext__() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:459: in ensure_test_sample_indexed pytest.fail(f"Expected files not indexed within {timeout}s: {missing}") E Failed: Expected files not indexed within 30s: ['test_sample.py', 'test_sample.md', 'test_sample.txt', 'test_empty.txt', 'test_binary.bin']

testcase.name: test_e2e_initial_scan_and_search

failure.message:
sqlalchemy.exc.ProgrammingError: (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable) relation "data_chunks_vectors" does not exist LINE 1: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_chunks_vectors ^
[SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_chunks_vectors] (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)

testcase.failure:
/home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:1967: in _exec_single_context self.dialect.do_execute( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/default.py:952: in do_execute cursor.execute(statement, parameters) E psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable: relation "data_chunks_vectors" does not exist E LINE 1: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_chunks_vectors E ^
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_e2e_full_workflow.py:68: in test_e2e_initial_scan_and_search chunks = get_chunks_count(db_engine) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:77: in get_chunks_count result = conn.execute(text("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_chunks_vectors")) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:1419: in execute return meth( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/sql/elements.py:527: in _execute_on_connection return connection._execute_clauseelement( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:1641: in _execute_clauseelement ret = self._execute_context( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:1846: in _execute_context return self._exec_single_context( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:1986: in _exec_single_context self._handle_dbapi_exception( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:2363: in _handle_dbapi_exception raise sqlalchemy_exception.with_traceback(exc_info[2]) from e /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py:1967: in _exec_single_context self.dialect.do_execute( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/default.py:952: in do_execute cursor.execute(statement, parameters) E sqlalchemy.exc.ProgrammingError: (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable) relation "data_chunks_vectors" does not exist E LINE 1: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_chunks_vectors E ^ E E [SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_chunks_vectors] E (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)

testcase.name: test_e2e_search_with_chat
testcase.failure:
/home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:101: in map_httpcore_exceptions yield /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:394: in handle_async_request resp = await self._pool.handle_async_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:256: in handle_async_request raise exc from None /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection_pool.py:236: in handle_async_request response = await connection.handle_async_request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/connection.py:103: in handle_async_request return await self._connection.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:136: in handle_async_request raise exc /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:106: in handle_async_request ) = await self._receive_response_headers(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:177: in _receive_response_headers event = await self._receive_event(timeout=timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_async/http11.py:217: in _receive_event data = await self._network_stream.read( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_backends/anyio.py:32: in read with map_exceptions(exc_map): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpcore/_exceptions.py:14: in map_exceptions raise to_exc(exc) from exc E httpcore.ReadError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_e2e_full_workflow.py:158: in test_e2e_search_with_chat search_response = await ingestor_client.post(Ingestor.SEARCH, json=search_payload) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1859: in post return await self.request( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1540: in request return await self.send(request, auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1629: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1657: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1694: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_client.py:1730: in _send_single_request response = await transport.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:393: in handle_async_request with map_httpcore_exceptions(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/contextlib.py:158: in __exit__ self.gen.throw(value) /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/httpx/_transports/default.py:118: in map_httpcore_exceptions raise mapped_exc(message) from exc E httpx.ReadError

testcase.name: test_expected_invalid_files_in_db

error.message: failed on setup with "Failed: Expected files not indexed within 30s: ['test_sample.py', 'test_sample.md', 'test_sample.txt', 'test_empty.txt', 'test_binary.bin']"

testcase.error: /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:302: in _asyncgen_fixture_wrapper result = event_loop.run_until_complete(setup()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/asyncio/base_events.py:691: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /home/sokatov/.conda/envs/usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:284: in setup res = await gen_obj.__anext__() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:459: in ensure_test_sample_indexed pytest.fail(f"Expected files not indexed within {timeout}s: {missing}") E Failed: Expected files not indexed within 30s: ['test_sample.py', 'test_sample.md', 'test_sample.txt', 'test_empty.txt', 'test_binary.bin']

failure.message: AssertionError: File test_batch_e0edf8a2_0.txt should be indexed assert None is not None
